emails.body: Re: Telecom Services: Broadband Services: USA: Senators renew high-speed Internet tax credit It's fun and games every day (can't wait to catch up---you will howl (or cry, not sure which)). Miss you guys terribly. Don't throw me out of the club for being AWOL, please. Hope to see you soon. Best, Jeff Sue Nord 01/24/2001 10:19 AM
